title: Ubiquiti RocketDish 31dBi, 5GHz AC, Rocket Kit
description: Ubiquiti RocketDish RD-5G31-AC is a 2x2 parabolic antenna suitable for long PtP coupled using Rocket M units. The main benefit compared to the previous model is excellent isolation of the antero-posterior ratio and SNR / noise isolation. A great benefit is the integration of Radom for easier installation and better weather conditions Thanks to the built-in mounting system of the so-called rocket kit, any Rocket unit can be directly mounted on this antenna without the need for additional accessories. Simply click the Rocket and you're done Antenna with radom cover Mast holder + screws, nuts Protective cover of the unit (2) RF cables
specsSearch: Wireless features MIMO, SISO 2 x 2 Polarization VH VSWR < 1,4 Cross-Pol Isolation [dB] 35 Wireless frequency 5 GHz Antenna type Directional Antenna gain [dBi] 31 Connectors and Interfaces Rocket kit Yes RF connectors (2) RSMA female
